_meta.purpose: Manifest of external Qur'an text corpora used for source matching. The actual corpus files are NOT bundled in this repository — the user must obtain them under the upstream license terms and place them under scripts/_raw/. The match-sources script reads them locally and produces a match report; nothing in this manifest authorises copying or redistributing the underlying texts.
_meta.policyNote: Source matching produces evidence about whether the curated readings already in quranData.json match an external corpus character-for-character. It is NOT scholar verification. An exact match may justify replacing a manual_placeholder source id with a real source id; it does NOT permit promoting confidence to verified.

tanzil-hafs-uthmani.label: Tanzil Uthmani — Hafs ʿan ʿĀṣim
tanzil-hafs-uthmani.licenseNote: User must manually accept Tanzil terms before download. Attribution required; no modification of the text.
tanzil-hafs-uthmani.provenanceWarning: Local corpus exists but source URL and retrieval method are not confirmed.

kfgqpc-warsh.label: KFGQPC Warsh ʿan Nāfiʿ
kfgqpc-warsh.licenseNote: Use only under KFGQPC terms. Raw files are not bundled in this repository.
kfgqpc-warsh.provenanceWarning: Local corpus exists but source URL and retrieval method are not confirmed.
